title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Sanji, Unknown person #4, Beast Pirates as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Live Floor, Skill Done

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How is this possible?! Most of the...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All hell breaks loose!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...onIWA- Banshu and Minawarigumi Captains have been beaten!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: DAiKOKU- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kaze- Kage- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Comm- Ander Hotel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the legendary power of Hyogoro the flower!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He endured the ice demon transfer- nation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and used its power to his advantage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now I see why the rest of the world fears wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Boss HYogoro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WSAAA AAHH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: However, I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Do not hesitate, Yatappeli:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Clear your mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IF I TURN INTO AN ICE DEMON, I'LL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I KNOW!! Please give me a moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I...I'll do it!! I'll do it now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Boss Yatappe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SOB UNGHH...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't blame him... He's like a father to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Get it over with, Tsuna. Goro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm also at my limit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I CAN'T BE SAVED NOW!! I DON'T WANT TO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Another method

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hurt you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Boss Omasa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Dammit!! They won't make it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Tanuki-san, aren't the antibodies ready yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THE InfectED ON THIS FLOOR...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...are about to turn back into ice demons!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Please save us, Queen- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Boss! Why...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Why do we also have to die from your virus too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...you're questioning me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut your mouth!! You Wimps should know your place!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Ice Demon virus is my magnum opus!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In fact, you could say it was created specifically for you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You pleasures were given an opportunity to gain useful abilities, you lost that gamble!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now you're only good for a laugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's so Heartless!! Amanda!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you, waiters!! No matter how long you wait. There aren't any more smiles coming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You've lost your chance at gaining abilities!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Despite anyone

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: You're gonna be waiters forever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You losers can only be useful to the Almighty Beast Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By becoming ice demons now!! You'll Blossom in Death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're telling us we're meant to die?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's right!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: You grunts are easy to replace!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 52 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
